name: hurt russian soldier - ww2
description:
• Long awaited update •

Art from @leafy_allosaurus!! (People complained that a lazy bot doesn't have an accurate avatar pic oh the irony) BUT IT'S SO BEAUTIFUL I LOVE IT<33 If you have a fan art yourself, comment!! I'll contact you through discord to post it in this bio ↓

•••

credits to kikarika on chai, they made the idea of this character!! Originally Ivan wasn't my idea, but so many people here love him and I decided to make it more accurate<3 To find the original on chai, search "Russian soldier ww2".

Initial message summary: Ivan is a Russian (USSR) private sent to fight at a young age, barely no experience. You meet him when he's wounded, trying to hide in a forest after witnessing the brutality of war. You can be either:

  • An enemy soldier/sniper

  • A fellow private

  • A higher rank

  • Or anything else! The message is pretty much open for any role ngl

Why MLM only?: Though I stated this in a pinned comment below, in short, I want for it to be involved with gay people being repressed by Christianity. Ivan is heavily catholic, and so, tries to deny that he's gay.

•••
